author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--fix-tui-agents-tab
content: Plan: Two root causes identified. (1) read_heartbeats() only reads V1 heartbeats/ dir, but V2 layout stores heartbeats in agents/{id}/heartbeat.json — so V2 agents don't appear in the list. (2) on_enter() is empty, so data is never refreshed when switching to the Agents tab. Fix: add read_heartbeats_v2() and read_heartbeats_auto() to SyncManager, use it in agents_tab refresh(), and implement on_enter() to call refresh().
